info.description: Secured operational API for the AgriInsight web BFF.
info.title: AgriInsight Backend API

get.description: Returns at most 100 entries within a required UTC period of 366 days or less.

post.description: Appends one positive VND posting to the operating-cost ledger. Procurement spend and inventory value remain separate lenses.

get.summary: Get an operating cost ledger entry

post.description: Atomically appends an exact reversal and one validated replacement. The original ledger row is never updated or deleted.

get.description: Groups only the OPERATING_COST lens. Procurement spend and inventory value are never merged into these totals.

post.description: Posts an atomic ledger transaction and updates lot, balance, and procurement projections. Quantities use the material base unit.
post.summary: Post an inventory receipt or issue

post.description: Creates a linked reversal without mutating ledger history. Partial reversals cannot exceed the source transaction's remaining quantity.

BadRequest.description: The request is malformed or invalid

Conflict.description: The request conflicts with current resource state

Forbidden.description: The authenticated principal is not authorized

quantityBase.description: Positive quantity to reverse in the material base unit

batchCode.description: Supplier batch code required for receipts

expiryDate.description: Lot expiry date required for receipts

quantityBase.description: Positive quantity in the material base unit

referenceCode.description: Optional source document or purchase-order reference

stockLotId.description: Optional source lot for a targeted issue

supplierId.description: Required for receipts and omitted for issues

unitCostVnd.description: Receipt unit cost in VND; omitted for issues

correctionReason.description: Why reversal and replacement are required

amountVnd.description: Positive VND amount; never procurement or inventory value

targetId.description: Required except when targetType is TENANT
